title: astragalus dolichocarpus
intro: Astragalus dolichocarpus, also known as the long-podded milkvetch, is a type of perennial plant belonging to the pea family (Fabaceae). This plant has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits associated with Astragalus dolichocarpus include boosting the immune system, reducing fatigue, and improving cardiovascular health. Astragalus dolichocarpus is often prepared as a dried root, decoction, or tea, and can also be used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine.
